description: No trained category-specific Revision Compiler model; deterministic compiler and Steering Recipe bindings only.
No adopted Remotion Timeline or Elah interactive UI; canonical read-only timeline projection only.
Selective rerun request is compiled but not transported to a live Pipeline API.
Control Tower consumes development read models rather than live AIR, Interview, Pipeline, VAE and Delegation streams.
HumanResolution uses an append-only local ledger; no Supabase/Postgres control-plane implementation.
Programming-material indexing is deterministic lexical memory only; dataset builder and shadow replay are not implemented.
Runtime/provider/worker health projections are typed but not connected to live workers.
Ship decision is implemented; no external publication adapter executes a real publish.
Category workbench browser surface is a self-contained development projection, not a deployed interactive application.
VAE and Delegation supervisory modules are registry entries without live integration.
No multi-user authentication, concurrency, lease or optimistic UI conflict handling.
Direct manipulation is an adapter API; no drag/trim/canvas UI emits deltas yet.
Audit export is canonical JSON plus hashes, not a signed portable archive.
Character Performance Studio and Format 02 remain deferred.
